raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I submitted complaint XXXX. I am now filing a new complaint to follow up on the same matter given that Banana Republic Rewards MASTERCARD - BARCLAYS has NOT adjusted the OVERCHARGE. It sent a letter with an opaque and unsatisfactory explanation. A merchant charged and provided a receipt for a particular amount and Mastercard Barclays is charging {$280.00} in excess of such charge with no explanation. In addition, Mastercard Barclays is charging {$410.00} as an additional foreign transaction fee. The communication of such excessive charge is far from clear or evident in its credit card agreement. In Mastercard Barclays ' last letter dated XX/XX/XXXX, it provides a contact number should one have questions. I have called this number, and unfortunately no person answers. I have left messages and am awaiting a response. I fear that I will receive more of the same type of opaque response. I have been following up on this matter since XXXX XXXX, XXXX. The institution makes it very hard for a client to resolve a dispute. I can not help but ask what is its true intention! PLEASE HELP. Thank you, XXXX XXXX XXXX
